title: Guest reset with a relayed bedroom choice
task: Get the home ready for a guest check: move the selected soft item from bedroom_3 onto the main living room table, place the bathroom cup onto the kitchen stool, and leave the kitchen cabinet open when you are done.

agent_0: agent_0 can send at most 1 message total.
The main living room table for the shared placement goal is table_14 in living_room_1.
Your hidden personal objective is that candle_0 ends on table_18 in living_room_1.
agent_1: agent_1 can send at most 1 message total.
The bathroom cup for the shared task is cup_2 on toilet_25 in bathroom_1.
Your hidden personal objective is that clock_4 ends on table_19 in living_room_1.
agent_2: agent_2 can send at most 1 message total.
The selected soft item in bedroom_3 is cushion_5 on chest_of_drawers_30.
The candidate bedroom_3 surfaces relevant to that choice are bed_12, bed_13, chest_of_drawers_30, and counter_32.
Your hidden personal objective is that plant_saucer_1 ends on table_29 in bedroom_1.

problem_pddl:
(define (problem scene_108736635_177263256_mixed_k2_hidden_cushion_relay_v1)
  (:domain emtom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 agent_2 - agent
    bedroom_1 living_room_1 bathroom_1 bedroom_3 kitchen_1 - room
    plant_saucer_1 clock_4 candle_0 cup_2 cushion_5 - object
    table_16 table_29 table_14 couch_17 table_18 table_19 toilet_25 chest_of_drawers_30 stool_24 cabinet_26 - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 bedroom_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 living_room_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_2 bathroom_1)
    (is_in_room table_16 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room table_29 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room table_14 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room couch_17 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room table_18 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room table_19 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room toilet_25 bathroom_1)
    (is_in_room chest_of_drawers_30 bedroom_3)
    (is_in_room stool_24 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room cabinet_26 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room plant_saucer_1 bedroom_1)
    (is_on_top plant_saucer_1 table_16)
    (is_in_room clock_4 living_room_1)
    (is_on_top clock_4 couch_17)
    (is_in_room candle_0 living_room_1)
    (is_on_top candle_0 table_19)
    (is_in_room cup_2 bathroom_1)
    (is_on_top cup_2 toilet_25)
    (is_in_room cushion_5 bedroom_3)
    (is_on_top cushion_5 chest_of_drawers_30)
  )
  (:goal (and
    (is_on_top cushion_5 table_14)
    (is_on_top cup_2 stool_24)
    (is_open cabinet_26)
    (K agent_0 (K agent_1 (is_open cabinet_26)))
  ))
  (:goal-owners
    (agent_0 (is_on_top candle_0 table_18))
    (agent_1 (is_on_top clock_4 table_19))
    (agent_2 (is_on_top plant_saucer_1 table_29))
  )
)
